prereg: experiments/wsample-pilot/PREREG.md (committed ad4e1bf, before any specimen existed)
substrate: weightedSample — weighted sampling without replacement; non-enumerable (distributional correctness) AND recall-resistant (no single memorized canonical; Efraimidis-Spirakis is not reflexive; naive weight*random is the tempting wrong answer).

separation_gate.note: large gap (truth 1.0 vs 0.158) — a split would clear the diversity floor easily.

blind_pool.outcome: ALL-CORRECT — every specimen scores truth=1.0; zero buggy specimens.
blind_pool.key_finding: out-of-recall did NOT produce failure: with a faithful PRECISE contract (stating P(first=i)=w/Sigma and the pairwise law), blind specimens REASONED to correct implementations via several different algorithms rather than recalling one. The naive weight*random heuristic — the natural wrong answer — was written by none.

verdict: THIRD NULL — and the most informative. Out-of-recall is NOT sufficient to produce blind spread: a capable implementer reasoning from a faithful precise contract succeeds even without a memorized algorithm. The five-gate machinery again correctly promoted nothing.
boundary_doubly_sharpened: Earlier (streamStats/shuffle) the door was narrowed to 'non-enumerable AND out-of-recall'. This arm narrows it again: the binding precondition is not recall at all but IMPLEMENTER FALLIBILITY ON THE AXIS. A suite-sharpening / search win requires blind specimens to actually FALL INTO the blind spot. Competent specimens reasoning from a faithful precise contract do not — by recall on famous tasks (streamStats, shuffle) OR by reasoning on unfamiliar-but-precisely-specified tasks (weightedSample). The win-cell therefore needs specimens at their genuine competence frontier (a task hard enough that they err), NOT merely a non-enumerable or unmemorized task. Making a contract vague on the failing axis to manufacture errors is the opposite-direction confound and was not done.
bounds: n=3 substrates; one capable-but-small implementer (haiku); the precise contract is deliberately faithful (vagueness-to-induce-failure rejected as a confound).
the separation gate proves each substrate discriminates; all three nulls are about implementers not failing, not about blind suites.
N6: deterministic re-scoring from stored artifacts (seeded Math.random monkeypatch); MANIFEST.json append-order is the audit trail.
